tools.name: open_drawio_xml
tools.description_first_line: Opens the draw.io editor with a diagram from XML content. Use this to view, edit, or create diagrams in draw.io format. The XML should be valid draw.io/mxGraph XML format.

content.description: The draw.io XML content in mxGraphModel format.

lightbox.description: Open in lightbox mode (read-only view). Default: false

tools.name: open_drawio_csv
tools.description_first_line: Opens the draw.io editor with a diagram generated from CSV data.

content.description: The CSV content following draw.io's CSV import format.

lightbox.description: Open in lightbox mode (read-only view). Default: false

tools.name: open_drawio_mermaid
tools.description_first_line: Opens the draw.io editor with a diagram generated from Mermaid.js syntax.

content.description: The Mermaid.js diagram definition. Example: 'graph TD; A-->B; B-->C;'

lightbox.description: Open in lightbox mode (read-only view). Default: false
